name: weeklyEmailDigest
description: Fetch recent emails and send a digest summary to yourself

parameters.name: timePeriod
parameters.description: Time period to summarize (e.g. 'this week', 'today', 'last 3 days')

parameters.name: focus
parameters.default: personal and work emails; skip promotional, marketing, and automated messages
parameters.description: What to focus on or exclude in the digest
